enriched_metadata.objective: Analyze the influence of demographic, social and academic factors on student performance and predict final grade G3 in Portuguese secondary schools
enriched_metadata.sources: Cortez & Silva (UCI Student Performance) - Two Portuguese secondary schools
enriched_metadata.features_description: 30 input variables covering demographics, family background, school-related factors, support systems and lifestyle, plus 3 grade outputs (G1, G2, G3)
enriched_metadata.representativity_description: 649 students in Mathematics and 649 in Portuguese from two Portuguese secondary schools (Gabriel Pereira and Mousinho da Silveira)
enriched_metadata.sample_balance_description: Balanced across mathematics and Portuguese subjects with equal sample sizes
enriched_metadata.missing_values_description: Clean dataset with no missing values - comprehensive data collection from school records
enriched_metadata.data_errors_description: Educational dataset with detailed student performance metrics. Limited ethical documentation regarding student consent and privacy measures.
